source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Consider a water pump that receives liquid water at 25\circ\text{C}, 100 kPa and delivers it to a same-diameter short pipe having a nozzle with an exit diameter of 2 cm (0.02 m) to the atmosphere at 100 kPa. Neglect the kinetic energy in the pipes and assume constant u for the water. Find the exit velocity if the pump draws 1 kW of power.

Neglect the kinetic energy in the pipes and assume constant u for the water. Find the exit velocity if the pump draws 1 kW of power.
